name: sentinel
description: Three coordinated development gate skills for requirements, verification, and documentation maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Gate development work with requirements, verification, and docs skills.
interface.longDescription: Sentinel packages three development workflow skills: requirements-gate turns vague requests into approved user stories, verification-gate checks implementation against story and design contracts before commit, and docs-maintenance keeps project documentation aligned after verified changes.
defaultPrompt: Use requirements-gate for this feature request.
Run verification-gate before I commit these changes.
Use docs-maintenance to update project documentation.
